title: Summarizing a Large Dataset with Entity Recognition
scenario: Write a prompt that generates a summary of a large dataset with entity recognition, where the dataset is represented as a CSV file. The summary should include the most common entities and their frequencies.
constraints: Must include a table with the most common entities and their frequencies

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the generated summary adhere to the constraints of being under 200 words and including a table with the most common entities and their frequencies?
Does the generated summary correctly identify the most common entities and their frequencies?
Is the generated summary readable and well-formatted?
